task.name: set-email-review-flag-r4-20260608
task.description: R4: iterativeScripting con raw() — mismo patrón que cleanup-numeric-emails-r11. Bypasea clockwork/Entra ID bug. Setea extension/upeu:emailReviewNeeded=true en active users sin emailAddress (~33,059 usuarios). Script en una sola línea (L6: CDATA inline sobrevive normalización MidPoint).

s:script.c:code: import com.evolveum.midpoint.xml.ns._public.common.common_3.UserType; import com.evolveum.midpoint.prism.path.ItemPath; import javax.xml.namespace.QName; def user = input; def uoid = user.getOid(); def uname = user.getName()?.getOrig(); def email = user.getEmailAddress(); if (email != null && !email.toString().trim().isEmpty()) { return; }; try { def flagQN = new QName('urn:upeu:midpoint:local', 'emailReviewNeeded'); def path = ItemPath.create(UserType.F_EXTENSION, flagQN); def delta = midpoint.prismContext.deltaFor(UserType.class).item(path).replace(Boolean.TRUE).asObjectDelta(uoid); def meoClass = Class.forName('com.evolveum.midpoint.model.api.ModelExecuteOptions'); def opts = meoClass.getMethod('create').invoke(null); opts = opts.getClass().getMethod('raw').invoke(opts); midpoint.executeChanges(java.util.Collections.singletonList(delta), opts); log.warn('FLAG-r4 OK: {}', uname); } catch (Exception e) { log.warn('FLAG-r4 ERR: {} ({}): {}', uname, uoid, e.message); }
